finding.summary: Track level is too high, approaching clipping with true peak at -0.3 dBFS, leaving insufficient headroom for mix integration.
finding.probable_cause: Track volume trim set to +5.0 dB, boosting the signal to near full scale. Combined with intersample peaks, this risks audible clipping and limits mix bus headroom.
finding.confidence_reason: Direct measurement of true peak at -0.3 dBFS from isolated capture, with track volume at +5.0 dB, confirms the level is excessive.

proposal.reason: Preview changing track volume from 5.000 dB to 2.000 dB to test whether true_peak_db decreases.
